response.overview: An experimental film looking at the dichotomy of the human condition - the artificial adverse to  the natural. The film explores the relationship between the natural and the artificial, and their  subsequent juxtaposition, in way of two mirrored personas who attempt to resolve their conflict.  As an experimental film, Anthropos aims to deconstruct the idea of character by expanding its  boundaries through elements of the film medium, from framing to costume design to visual effects  and overall cinematography, moulding the character to be intertwined with the cinematographics  of the film. The film reformulates the audiences emotional attachment to be a response to the  cinematographic character rather than an individual character.
response.tagline: An experimental film looking at the dichotomy of the human condition
response.title: Anthropos
